descriptionTemplate: Jenkin gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Crit. Rate +[Arg2]%. Each time Jenkin deals DMG, Temporary Crit. DMG +[Arg3]%, stacking up to 5 times per turn.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Jenkin gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Crit. Rate +[Arg2]%, and each time Jenkin deals DMG, Temporary Crit. DMG +[Arg3]%, stacking up to 5 times per turn. Double the Crit. DMG effect of {Spatial Fold} and {Mistborn Street Urchin}.
